MSFT.name: Microsoft Corporation
MSFT.desc: Enterprise software & cloud giant. Windows, Office 365, Azure cloud, AI (Copilot). 35%+ ROIC. Act III: AI integration across all products.

AMZN.name: Amazon.com Inc.
AMZN.desc: E-commerce + AWS cloud + advertising. Three Acts: Books→Everything→AWS→Ads. Network effects in marketplace and logistics infrastructure.

GOOGL.name: Alphabet Inc.
GOOGL.desc: Google Search, YouTube, Android, Google Cloud. Dominant in digital advertising (40% market share). AI moat via DeepMind and data.

META.name: Meta Platforms Inc.
META.desc: Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Threads. 3B+ users. Network effects make it the strongest social platform moat. AI-driven ads recovery.

AAPL.name: Apple Inc.
AAPL.desc: iPhone, Mac, iPad, Services, Wearables. 1B+ installed base. Ecosystem lock-in = pricing power. Services growing at 15%+.

NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
NVDA.desc: Dominant in AI GPUs (80%+ market share). CUDA software moat. Data center revenue growing 100%+. Asset-light (fabless) model.

TSM.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
TSM.desc: World's largest semiconductor foundry. Manufactures chips for Apple, NVIDIA, AMD. $100B+ capex cycle. Geopolitical risk but irreplaceable.

AMD.name: Advanced Micro Devices
AMD.desc: CPU and GPU competitor to Intel/NVIDIA. Gaining data center share. MI300 AI chip challenging NVIDIA. Fabless model.

AVGO.name: Broadcom Inc.
AVGO.desc: Diversified semiconductor + infrastructure software. Networking chips, VMware acquisition. 60%+ gross margin. Dividend growth compounder.

ASML.name: ASML Holding N.V.
ASML.desc: ONLY manufacturer of EUV lithography machines ($200M+ each). Every advanced chip made on ASML tools. 10+ year visibility. Structural monopoly.

AMAT.name: Applied Materials
AMAT.desc: Semiconductor equipment leader. Deposition, etch, inspection tools. Benefits from chip fab expansion. Cyclical but secular tailwind.

NOW.name: ServiceNow Inc.
NOW.desc: Enterprise workflow automation platform. IT, HR, customer service modules. 99% retention rate. Expanding into AI agents.

SNPS.name: Synopsys Inc.
SNPS.desc: EDA software (chip design tools). Duopoly with Cadence. Every chip designed uses Synopsys tools. Ansys acquisition expands into simulation.

VEEV.name: Veeva Systems
VEEV.desc: Cloud software for life sciences. CRM, data management, regulatory. 80%+ of top pharma companies are customers. Vertical SaaS moat.

CRM.name: Salesforce Inc.
CRM.desc: #1 CRM platform. Sales, service, marketing cloud. Agentforce AI platform. 90%+ Fortune 500 customers. Subscription model.

SHOP.name: Shopify Inc.
SHOP.desc: E-commerce platform for merchants. 2M+ businesses. Competing with Amazon via independent store model. Payments + logistics ecosystem.

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies
PLTR.desc: AI-powered data analytics for government + enterprise. AIP platform. High growth (30%+). Controversial valuation (100x+ P/E).

V.name: Visa Inc.
V.desc: World's largest payment network. 4B+ cards. Toll bridge on global commerce. 50%+ operating margin. Network effects lock in both merchants and banks.

MA.name: Mastercard Inc.
MA.desc: Second-largest payment network. Similar moat to Visa. Expanding into B2B, cyber security, data analytics. Cash digitization tailwind.

ADYEN.name: Adyen N.V.
ADYEN.desc: Dutch payment processor. Single platform for online + in-store + backend. Customers: Uber, Spotify, Microsoft. Merchant-first approach.

MELI.name: MercadoLibre Inc.
MELI.desc: Latin America's Amazon + PayPal + Shopify combined. E-commerce, payments (Mercado Pago), logistics, credit. Dominant in Brazil, Argentina, Mexico.

COIN.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
COIN.desc: Largest US crypto exchange. 100M+ verified users. Diversifying into staking, custody, Base blockchain. Cyclical but regulatory moat improving.

IBKR.name: Interactive Brokers
IBKR.desc: Electronic broker for professionals. Lowest margin rates. Global exchange access. Growing retail + institutional. Automation advantage.

SQ.name: Block Inc.
SQ.desc: Square payment terminals + Cash App. Bitcoin integration. Afterpay BNPL. Jack Dorsey-led. Fintech ecosystem play.

SPGI.name: S&P Global Inc.
SPGI.desc: Credit ratings (S&P), market data (Capital IQ), indices (S&P 500), commodity data (Platts). Data monopoly. 50%+ operating margin.

MCO.name: Moody's Corporation
MCO.desc: Credit ratings + research. Duopoly with S&P. Regulatory license creates barrier to entry. Analytics business growing 10%+.

ICE.name: Intercontinental Exchange
ICE.desc: Owns NYSE + global futures exchanges. Mortgage technology. Data services. Exchange monopoly + recurring data revenue.

CME.name: CME Group Inc.
CME.desc: World's largest derivatives exchange. Interest rate, equity, commodity futures. 90%+ electronic trading. Toll bridge on risk management.

BLK.name: BlackRock Inc.
BLK.desc: World's largest asset manager ($10T+ AUM). iShares ETF franchise. Aladdin risk platform. Asset gathering compounder.

BN.name: Brookfield Corporation
BN.desc: Alternative asset manager. Real estate, infrastructure, renewable energy, private equity. $900B+ AUM. Global diversification.

TCEHY.name: Tencent Holdings
TCEHY.desc: WeChat (1.3B users), gaming (world's largest), cloud, payments. China's internet utility. Diversified investment portfolio.

BABA.name: Alibaba Group
BABA.desc: China's largest e-commerce + cloud provider. Taobao, Tmall, AliCloud. Regulatory reset. AI cloud growth. Undervalued on sum-of-parts.

SE.name: Sea Limited
SE.desc: Southeast Asian internet platform. Shopee (e-commerce), Garena (gaming), SeaMoney (fintech). Regional dominance in high-growth markets.

GRAB.name: Grab Holdings
GRAB.desc: Southeast Asian super-app. Ride-hailing, food delivery, payments, lending. Dominant in 8 countries. Path to profitability improving.

UBER.name: Uber Technologies
UBER.desc: Global ride-hailing + food delivery. 150M+ monthly users. Network effects in driver/rider density. Expanding into advertising + freight.

CPRT.name: Copart Inc.
CPRT.desc: Online vehicle auction platform. 200+ locations globally. 85%+ market share in US salvage auctions. Network effects in buyer/seller density.

TDG.name: TransDigm Group
TDG.desc: Aerospace component manufacturer. Proprietary, sole-source parts for commercial + military aircraft. 50%+ margins. Pricing power via regulatory lock-in.

DE.name: Deere & Company
DE.desc: World's largest agricultural equipment maker. Precision ag tech. Autonomous tractors. Subscription revenue from digital services. Cyclical but tech-enabled.

FN.name: Fabrinet
FN.desc: Precision optical manufacturing. Makes components for NVIDIA, Lumentum, Infinera. Optical networking + data center demand. Asset-light manufacturing.

ISRG.name: Intuitive Surgical
ISRG.desc: Da Vinci surgical robot maker. 9,000+ systems installed. Razor/blade model (instruments + service = recurring). 70% gross margin. Expanding into new procedures.

IDXX.name: IDEXX Laboratories
IDXX.desc: Veterinary diagnostics leader. Pet testing equipment + consumables. Razor/blade model. Pet ownership tailwind. 85%+ recurring revenue.

SPOT.name: Spotify Technology
SPOT.desc: World's largest audio streaming platform. 600M+ users, 250M+ subscribers. Network effects in playlist data. Expanding into audiobooks + video.

ROKU.name: Roku Inc.
ROKU.desc: #1 streaming TV platform in US. 80M+ active accounts. Platform revenue (ads + content distribution) growing faster than hardware. CTV advertising tailwind.

TSLA.name: Tesla Inc.
TSLA.desc: EV maker + energy storage + autonomy. Brand moat. manufacturing efficiency. FSD/AI optionality. Highly controversial valuation.

EVO.name: Evolution AB
EVO.desc: Live casino game provider. 700+ tables globally. B2B model (casinos pay fee). 60%+ EBITDA margin. Regulatory moat as licensed provider.

MU.name: Micron Technology
MU.desc: Memory chip maker (DRAM, NAND). Oligopoly with Samsung, SK Hynix. Highly cyclical but AI demand creating structural shift. HBM memory for AI GPUs.

BKNG.name: Booking Holdings
BKNG.desc: Booking.com, Priceline, Kayak, OpenTable. World's largest online travel agency. Network effects in hotel inventory + traveler reviews. Capital-light.

CRWD.name: CrowdStrike Holdings
CRWD.desc: Cybersecurity leader. Falcon platform (endpoint, cloud, identity). AI-native threat detection. 95%+ gross retention. Expanding modules per customer.

PANW.name: Palo Alto Networks
PANW.desc: Cybersecurity platform. Next-gen firewall + cloud security + SOC. Platformization strategy. 60%+ of Fortune 500. Recurring subscription model.

MPWR.name: Monolithic Power Systems
MPWR.desc: Analog semiconductor chips. Power management for data centers, autos, industrials. Fabless model. 55%+ gross margin. Benefiting from AI data center buildout.

SPCX.name: SPACX
SPCX.desc: Space infrastructure + exploration. Satellite deployment, space stations. Emerging industry with long-term government + commercial demand.

CRCL.name: Circle Internet Financial
CRCL.desc: Issuer of USDC stablecoin ($50B+). Digital dollar infrastructure. Revenue from interest on reserves. Regulatory-first approach.

CSU.name: Constellation Software
CSU.desc: Acquirer of vertical market software companies. 500+ niche software businesses. Decentralized model. 30%+ ROIC on acquisitions. Canadian compounder.

EQIX.name: Equinix Inc.
EQIX.desc: World's largest data center REIT. 250+ facilities globally. Network-dense interconnection. Cloud on-ramps. 99.999% uptime. Digital infrastructure toll bridge.

AMT.name: American Tower Corp
AMT.desc: Cell tower REIT. 225,000+ towers globally. 5G densification tailwind. Recurring lease revenue with escalators. Carrier-agnostic infrastructure.

RMS.name: Rambus Inc.
RMS.desc: Semiconductor IP + memory interface chips. DDR5 memory interface. Data center memory bandwidth. Licensing + royalty model.

SMH.name: VanEck Semiconductor ETF
SMH.desc: ETF tracking 25 largest semiconductor companies. Proxy for semiconductor industry. Not a company — included as benchmark.

SGX.name: Singapore Exchange
SGX.desc: Singapore's stock + derivatives exchange. Asian gateway. Growing derivatives volume. Monopoly on Singapore listings.

DBS.name: DBS Group Holdings
DBS.desc: Singapore's largest bank. Digital banking leader. Strong ASEAN presence. 15%+ ROE. Safest bank in Asia (multiple awards).

D05.SG.name: DBS Group Holdings
D05.SG.desc: Singapore's largest bank. Digital banking leader. Strong ASEAN presence. 15%+ ROE.
